metadata.description: igittigitt delivered as a single Claude Code plugin: a skill to install, configure and use igittigitt (a 100% git-compatible .gitignore parser and path filter for Python and the shell).

plugins.name: igittigitt
plugins.description: Install, configure and use igittigitt: parse .gitignore, decide if paths are ignored, whitelist/filter huge file sets, as a Python library, a CLI, or in bash pipelines.
